crossLagR 0.1.0

estimateRICLPMl

estimateRICLPMl.Rd

Generates lavaan model syntax for RI-CLPM with multiple indicators per construct, where the first indicator has a fixed factor loading of 1 and subsequent indicators have free factor loadings.

Usage

estimateRICLPMl(
  time_varying_x = list(c("x1_1", "x1_2"), c("x2_1", "x2_2")),
  time_varying_y = list(c("y1_1", "y1_2"), c("y2_1", "y2_2")),
  time_varying_z = NULL,
  time_invariant_vars = NULL,
  waves
)

Arguments

time_varying_x

A list of vectors, each containing variable names for the X indicators at each wave.

time_varying_y

A list of vectors, each containing variable names for the Y indicators at each wave.

time_varying_z

An optional list of vectors for Z indicators at each wave.

time_invariant_vars

A vector of variable names for time-invariant variables.

waves

The number of waves (time points) in the model.

Value

A character string containing lavaan model syntax.

Details

This function generates lavaan syntax for an RI-CLPM with multiple indicators, following the unified framework of Usami, Murayama, & Hamaker (2019). See estimateRICLPM for the unified parameter naming convention.

Parameter labels:

  • ar_x, ar_y, ar_z: Autoregressive (within-person carry-over).

  • cl_xy, cl_yx, etc.: Cross-lagged effects.

  • I_x, I_y, I_z: Trait factors (random intercepts).

References

Usami, S., Murayama, K., & Hamaker, E. L. (2019). A unified framework of longitudinal models to examine reciprocal relations. Psychological Methods, 24(5), 637-657.

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
model_syntax <- estimateRICLPMl(
  time_varying_x = list(c("x1_1", "x1_2"), c("x2_1", "x2_2")),
  time_varying_y = list(c("y1_1", "y1_2"), c("y2_1", "y2_2")),
  waves = 2)
cat(model_syntax)
} # }
